name: Add StackShift Scheduled Publishing to production
description:
Added StackShift Scheduled Publishing to WebriQ website. 

The schedule publish workflow is still the same. However, it's important to take note of the following: 

1. All previous schedules won't be displayed on the Schedules page.  This is expected as this is a different plugin (tho based off the sanity version).


2.  The blog page published date field is now read-only and gets updated automatically when the page is published or based on the publish schedule.


3. The scheduler currently gets and sets the user's timezone by default. We'll be adding the feature to allow setting different timezones in the next update.

name: Verify Adding Review to Product Page
description:
Current process:
1. User submits a review in the products page eg: Sentinel
2. Admin received the Review via email.
3. Admin goes to Sanity - Products - Sentinel - Reviews and manually add the Review
4. Publish the new review
5. Site rebuild and the Review should now become visible in the Sentinel product page

Verify if after a review is added from the studio its displayed on the product page (post build)

name: Product Reviews update
description:
Current Workflow:
1. User leave a product reviews in the product_xyz
2. Swampfox gets email notification from the WebriQ form reviews
3. Swampfox team needs to manually do the following:
    1. Login to Sanity
    2. Go to the Products page -> reviews tab -> add the new review
    3. Publish the review and done.

Current challenge:
- The current integration is using a "manual schema" to add the review using a 'dropdown' field in Sanity which is open buggy meaning it does not scroll to the bottom of the reviews making it hard to manage.

Propose Solution:
- Create a separate "Reviews" schema in Sanity
- Reference the reviews from the product pages.

Cart Revamp
description:
Hello @Eleazar, we got a project that we want to get started on asap. We are planning to start offering a lot more merch and patches and want to also increase our average order value with upsells and free gifts. spec and images below. Let me know what you think.

Project Scope for Cart Revamp

Cart page redesign
- open slideout modal on desktop and full screen modal on mobile
- design will feature a quantity selection and a trash icon to remove items from the cart

New components on cart page:
1. “Free Gift” progress tracker.
2. Select your free gift drawer
3. Upsell Drawer


The free gift component will need a section in Sanity that allows us to populate a free gift category and a cart value threshold for that category. The free gift progress tracker should display “Spend $X more to earn a free gift!” with X being the $ value needed to reach the free gift threshold. (throughout the year we may have a free gift like a patch that is given at $100, or we may have a Jacket that is offered at $300)

Upsell components will need a new section on product pages in sanity (similar to related products) that allows us to set upsell products to display for that product if the product is in the cart.

Upsell products AND free gifts need to be linked to the products variants, not the parent product id, due to needing the add to cart button to directly and immediately add the correct sku. For example the Warhorse would have the 34mm ring diameter Hostile Engagement mount as an upsell, we wouldn't want the add to cart button to allow the user to select the variant as they may select the wrong ring diameter. This means we would need a way to set the correct variant for each upsell product and not just select the product page from sanity.

Logic for upsell can be hardcoded. If a product is added to cart and none of the upsell products are in the cart then the upsell component should display on the cart. If 2 products with upsell products are added to the cart and no upsell products are in the cart all upsell products should show in the drawer, if only 1 product has an upsell product in the cart then only display the upsell products for the item that doesn't have any in the cart.

The free gift logic for pricing will be handled in Bigcommerce, so the component just needs to add the correct sku to the cart and display the promo price of $0, bigcommerce will handle the logic of “If cart value >$X, make sku sck45039 $0”

If every item in the cart has a valid upsell product also in the cart the upsell drawer should be hidden

If a free gift has been selected and the free gift is in the cart the free gift drawer should be hidden

By default if the cart value is < the free gift threshold the upsell component should display as expanded

Only one component on the cart should open at a time, like a toggle, if the upsell component is opened the free gift component should close, if the free gift component is then expanded the upsell component should close.

The icons under the upsell component and the free gift component should display the number of applicable upsell components/ free gifts, with a solid infill indicating the current item and a stroked circle showing the remaining items. If there are 8 items it should show 1 solid circle and 7 stroked circles, the user should be able to swipe or click and drag the free gift window to display the next item in the carousel. If there is only 1 item don't display any dots.

The free gift component should show the item's regular price (set in sanity for that product) as a strike-through, with $0 displayed under the strike-through price.
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1MhycDg9X4zrwZ52lB2a2382sQ1kKTlM6AhZXwt26kZY/edit?usp=sharing

name: Homepage Slider Request
description:
Hello @Eleazar or @Customer Support, we are looking to add a slider to the home page to replace the static hero image. In the past I have used sliderrevolution for wordpress, is there anything similar available for our site?

We want the ability to add separate text lines or blocks, background images, fore-ground images that can slide in, customizable animations for different elements and responsive controls for desktop vs mobile. Is there anything available that we wouldn't have to develop from scratch?
